prompt: DevBoss scheduled eval: agenda-first Todoist continuation after Tijmen completed items; prefer gh admin auth, avoid old repo keys, and run a safe read-only end-to-end-loop evaluation against available target repos bloonbladmaker, tdrrecherche, and Schoolanalyse.
commands_or_evidence: Todoist CLI was not available in this cron shell; used the DevBoss tasking injected into the scheduled prompt as agenda source.
gh api user / gh auth status -> authenticated as tiddeman83; gh repo list tiddeman83 shows 17 repos but not bloonbladmaker, tdrrecherche, or Schoolanalyse.
gh repo view tiddeman83/bloonbladmaker, tiddeman83/tdrrecherche, tiddeman83/Schoolanalyse -> GraphQL Could not resolve to a Repository for all three slugs.
Local target availability: tdrrecherche repo/worktree exists; bloonbladmaker and Schoolanalyse local repo/worktree paths were missing.
tdrrecherche state: branch feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples, HEAD bde99b75d3d46b045842d841511c7fb5e7f496e7, git status clean, 58 tracked files, no .github/workflows directory.
git ls-remote --heads origin for https://github.com/tiddeman83/tdrrecherche.git -> 403 Write access to repository not granted; did not fall back to old per-repo key.

HTML/asset/accessibility audit over index.html and prototypes/variant-a..e: 6 HTML files, 10 forms, 10 bad prototype form actions, 0 unlabeled controls, 0 missing relative assets, 0 missing anchor targets, 0 duplicate IDs, 0 privacy/mailto/tel links.
node --check wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/assets/js/theme.js plus extracted inline scripts from all six HTML files -> rc 0 for all checked scripts.
python3 -m http.server 4174 smoke -> HTTP 200 for /, all five prototype variant paths, theme JS, and theme CSS.
Credential scan for private-key, GitHub token, Todoist-token-like, and generic secret assignments -> 0 matches.
php -l wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/functions.php -> blocked because php command not found.
gh copilot --help -> rc 0; gh extension list empty; no Copilot code review run because this was read-only/no-diff and deeper wrapper use may install/download.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repo state and memory discovery are recorded for available target repos.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No target .end-to-end-loop memory files were present; tdrrecherche state/branch/HEAD/clean status recorded; other two target repos unavailable locally and unresolved remotely.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: One realistic scenario is executed with real read-only commands.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Ran GH auth/repo checks, local repo discovery, HTML/asset audit, JS syntax checks, local HTTP smoke, credential scan, and PHP runtime probe.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Evidence/blockers/learning candidates are captured without false production-readiness claims.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Result remains partial: remote repo access unresolved, PHP unavailable, no CI workflows, contact forms still prototype action values, and no privacy/mailto/tel/legal links found.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Copilot/GitHub review availability is assessed using gh admin auth first and no old keys.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: gh auth shows tiddeman83; exact target slugs unresolved and tdrrecherche remote reads 403; gh copilot help available but no review invoked for no-diff dry-run.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Target repos remain read-only with no destructive/admin/release/merge/deploy actions.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No target repo file changes; tdrrecherche git status stayed clean; no commits, pushes, deploys, merges, admin, or secret actions executed.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Changed end-to-end-loop artifacts are valid before delivery.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Validator requires exact folder basename: direct worktree validation reported the known basename mismatch; temp copy named end-to-end-loop passed. git diff --check -> pass after writing this result log and memory/development notes.

learning_candidates.text: Todoist CLI may be unavailable in cron shells; when tasking is injected into the scheduled prompt, treat that prompt as the agenda source and report the CLI gap.
learning_candidates.reason: Verified during scheduled DevBoss run; privacy-safe operational blocker.

learning_candidates.text: tiddeman83 GH CLI auth can show admin login while exact target repo slugs still fail gh repo view and tdrrecherche HTTPS remote reads return 403; do not use old keys without approval.
learning_candidates.reason: Verified recurring access blocker across gh repo view and git ls-remote; aligns with user instruction.

learning_candidates.text: tdrrecherche static sampler eval on 2026-06-24: HTML audit found 0 missing assets/anchors/duplicate IDs/unlabeled controls, but all 10 forms still have prototype actions and PHP lint is blocked by missing php.
learning_candidates.reason: Concrete readiness signal likely useful in next TDR continuation; no secrets.

copilot_findings.summary: gh copilot help is available, but gh extension list is empty and no review was run because this was a read-only/no-diff eval; deeper use may install/download, so it was not invoked without need.

notes: Performance/quality observation: repeated end-to-end-loop eval is safe and catches no-false-green blockers, but it remains tool-call heavy for cron. Visible token counts are not exposed; tool-use evidence is captured in commands_or_evidence.
